general: imagery should have high appetite appeal
silo images should be photographed consistently according to packaging or product type
minimize reflections on plastic, foil, and shiny packaging, especially when covering important product information
remove unnecessary stickers not part of package design, such as special promotion stickers or legal declarations
packaging and labels should be presented straight, not angled or crooked
photograph each unique and meaningful side of the product package
for round or irregular shapes, present sides so printed information and graphics are centered and legible
front view is the side with predominant brand and labeling, format, variant, and size/quantity
products should be evenly lit from side to side and top to bottom
exposure and color should correctly represent the item
maintain separation between product and background
clip products onto pure white background, RGB 255/255/255
retouch dirt, dust, fingerprints, damage, blemishes, expiration dates, lot numbers, and sample-only information
lifestyle images should be realistic, professionally lit, and styled appropriately to the item and brand
product being sold should remain the hero of the lifestyle image
packaging should be incorporated into lifestyle images when practical to connect lifestyle images to silo shots
items must display all indicated required images and conditionally required images and meet the minimum image count listed on each page
media_notes: Individual brand guidelines should take precedence.
Media imagery should clearly communicate cover/front presentation, format, size, interior content, included components, and how the media is used or interacted with.
For books, print products, and physical media, show print/detail quality and interior view when useful.
For box sets, collector editions, or multi-piece items, show all included contents clearly.
common_additional_recommendations: Contents View: Show all included contents together for box sets, collector editions, or multi-piece items.
Spine View: Show a side view to display the spine or edge of the item.
What's Included: Show all included components in a clean flat-lay when multiple pieces are included.
Packaging: Show the front of retail-ready packaging on a pure white background when it differs from the product.
Format / Size Detail: Display product dimensions or physical format using a clean graphic when applicable.

main_image.label: Main Image
main_image.description: Primary carousel image/hero image for the PDP.

silo_front.label: Silo, Front
silo_front.guidance: Show the front cover or packaging straight-on on a pure white background.
silo_front.recommendation: Add a straight-on front cover or packaging image on pure white.

silo_detail.label: Silo, Detail
silo_detail.guidance: Show a close-up of print quality, finish, or detail.
silo_detail.recommendation: Add a close-up detail image showing print quality, finish, texture, or physical detail.

silo_front_in_pack.label: Silo, Front, In Pack
silo_front_in_pack.guidance: Show the front of retail-ready packaging on a pure white background when it differs from the product.
silo_front_in_pack.recommendation: Add a straight-on retail packaging image when packaging differs from the product.

lifestyle_in_use.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_in_use.guidance: Show product interaction or media in use.
lifestyle_in_use.recommendation: Add a lifestyle image showing product interaction or media in use.

dimensions.label: Dimensions
dimensions.recommendation: Add a dimensions or physical format graphic when applicable.

feature_graphic.label: Feature Graphic
feature_graphic.guidance: Detail an interactive feature, primary detail, additional capability, or value using clean graphic treatment.
feature_graphic.recommendation: Add a feature graphic highlighting an interactive feature, primary detail, or additional capability.

interior_view.label: Interior View
interior_view.guidance: Show the product open with interior components visible.
interior_view.recommendation: Add an interior view showing the product open with interior pages, components, or contents visible.

contents_view.label: Contents View
contents_view.guidance: Show all included contents together for box sets, collector editions, or multi-piece items.
contents_view.recommendation: Add a contents view showing included contents for box sets, collector editions, or multi-piece items.

spine_view.label: Spine View
spine_view.guidance: Show a side view to display the spine or edge of the item.
spine_view.recommendation: Add a spine or side view showing the spine or edge clearly.

graphic_whats_included.label: What's Included
graphic_whats_included.guidance: Show all included components in a clean flat-lay when multiple pieces are included.
graphic_whats_included.recommendation: Add a what's-included flat-lay when multiple pieces are included.

additional_recommendations: Contents View: Show all included contents together for box sets, collector editions, or multi-piece items.
Spine View: Show a side view to display the spine or edge of the item.
What's Included: Show all included components in a clean flat-lay when multiple pieces are included.
Packaging: Show the front of retail-ready packaging on a pure white background when it differs from the product.
Format / Size Detail: Display product dimensions or physical format using a clean graphic when applicable.
notes: Preserve repeated feature_graphic because the source page shows two separate feature graphics.
Silo Front should show the front cover or packaging straight-on on pure white.
Silo Detail should show print quality, finish, or detail.
Lifestyle should show product interaction or media in use.
Interior View should show the product open with interior components visible.
One feature graphic should detail an interactive feature or primary detail.
Another feature graphic should highlight an additional capability to reinforce value.
